fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly truncates floating-point shares to integers on line 71 using `int()`, which discards fractional parts. This causes the sum of the final allocations to be less than the total quota for failing tests.

constraints.intent: The sum of the final integer allocations must equal the total available quota.

spec.expr: sum(int(x) for x in raw__1) == int(total)

constraints.intent: The sum of the truncated raw shares must equal the integer part of the total quota.

spec.expr: int(total) - sum(int(x) for x in raw__1) == int(sum(x % 1 for x in raw__1))

constraints.intent: The shortfall from truncation must equal the integer part of the sum of the discarded fractions.
The sum of allocated quotas must equal the total available quota.
